sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92441" key="r(izo/futos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥιζό-φῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n92441.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">growing from a root</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1545.tlg001:1:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ocell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
